# Melvin Jones Repol

> Software Engineer / Full-Stack Web Developer / DevOps Enthusiast based in Taytay, Rizal, Philippines. Focused on building scalable web applications, backend systems, automation tools, and developer-focused platforms.

Core focus areas: full-stack web development, DevOps & cloud systems, backend architecture, automation & tooling, and AI integration in web systems.

Core skills: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js/Express, React/Next.js, Laravel, Docker, AWS/cloud architecture, PostgreSQL/MongoDB, API design, system design.

## Docs

- [Home](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com): Personal background, developer journey, real-time coding statistics, and technical philosophy.
- [Projects](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/projects): Comprehensive list of projects with summaries, tech stacks, and links.
- [Certificates](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/certificates): Certifications and courses completed in software development and related fields.
- [Work Experience](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/work-experience): Detailed work history with roles, responsibilities, and achievements.
- [Contact](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/contact): Contact form and social links for inquiries and networking.
- [Blog](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/blog): Articles on software development, project case studies, and technical insights.
- [Gallery](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/gallery): Visual showcase of projects, workspaces, and events.
- [Legal](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/legal): Legal information and policies for the website.

## Featured Projects

- [Ulisha Store](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/ulisha-store-laravel): Laravel/PHP/MySQL e-commerce platform for small to medium businesses with scalable architecture.
- [Canis Chatbot](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/canis-chatbot): TypeScript/Node.js/Prisma/Docker modular chatbot system for messaging platforms.
- [Point of Sale](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/point-of-sale): Lightweight, offline-capable point-of-sale system built on JavaScript and backend APIs.
- [Axleshift Freight Management](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/axleshift-freight-management): Full-stack logistics and freight management platform for tracking and operations.
- [Webvium Browser](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/webvium-browser): Custom Android web browser with unique features and optimizations.

+## Work Experience

- [Freelance Developer](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/work-experience): Independent full-stack development work across client projects.
- [Apptrade Inc.](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/work-experience): IT Staff Intern — internship focused on IT support and operations.
- [Up to Date Web Design](https://www.melvinjonesrepol.com/work-experience): Mid-Level Full-Stack Developer.

## Organizations

- [Hall of Codes](https://www.hallofcodes.org/): Community bringing developers, maintainers, and builders together to mentor newcomers, review work, and turn ideas into sustainable open-source projects.
- [The Webvium Project](https://webvium.melvinjonesrepol.com/): Ecosystem spanning Android browsers, website-to-app tools, and browser extensions, focused on performance, privacy, and simplicity.
- [Ulisha Limited](https://www.ulishalimited.com/): Builds the digital backbone for market efficiency, connecting households to cost-effective products and empowering local businesses with proprietary tech.
